book_title_en: Bhashakalika (Part I) - Class VI Sanskrit Textbook

objectives: Recite the prayer to Lord Ganesha.
Understand the meaning of the Ganesha prayer.
Recite the prayer to Goddess Saraswati.
Understand the meaning of the Saraswati prayer.
Identify and write Sanskrit vowels.
Pronounce Sanskrit vowels correctly.
Identify and write Sanskrit consonants.
Pronounce Sanskrit consonants correctly.
Understand the usage of Anuswara and Visarga.
Practice writing Anuswara and Visarga.

chapters.title_en: Chapter Three: Introduction to Vowel Signs

objectives: Learn to combine vowels with consonants.
Practice writing syllables with vowel signs.

chapters.title_en: Chapter Four: Application of Vowel Signs

objectives: Identify words with 'a' and 'aa' vowel signs.
Form simple words using these vowel signs.
Identify words with 'i' and 'ee' vowel signs.
Form simple words using these vowel signs.
Identify words with 'u' and 'oo' vowel signs.
Form simple words using these vowel signs.
Identify words with complex vowel signs.
Form simple words using these vowel signs.
Identify words with Anuswara and Visarga.
Understand the pronunciation of Anuswara and Visarga.
Understand the basic sounds of Sanskrit letters.
Practice correct pronunciation of letters.
Learn the sound of Visarga.
Identify nasal sounds (Anunasikavarna).
Identify and pronounce conjunct consonants.
Form words using conjunct consonants.

chapters.title_en: Chapter Six: Masculine Nouns ending in 'a'

objectives: Identify masculine nouns ending in 'a'.
Understand the basic forms of these nouns.
Learn common masculine nouns.
Practice using masculine nouns in simple sentences.

chapters.title_en: Chapter Seven: Feminine Nouns ending in 'aa'

objectives: Identify feminine nouns ending in 'aa'.
Understand the basic forms of these nouns.
Learn common feminine nouns.
Practice using feminine nouns in simple sentences.

chapters.title_en: Chapter Eight: Neuter Nouns ending in 'a'

objectives: Identify neuter nouns ending in 'a'.
Understand the basic forms of these nouns.
Learn common neuter nouns.
Practice using neuter nouns in simple sentences.

chapters.title_en: Chapter Nine: Masculine Nouns ending in 'i'

objectives: Identify masculine nouns ending in 'i' and 'u'.
Understand their basic forms and usage.
Form words with 'i' and 'u' ending nouns.
Complete exercises related to these nouns.
Learn Sanskrit numbers from 1 to 10.
Identify and write numbers in Sanskrit script.
Match numbers with corresponding objects.
Practice writing numbers in words and numerals.
Learn Sanskrit numbers from 11 to 20.
Practice counting objects up to twenty.
Understand the concept of ordinal numbers.
Identify ordinal numbers in Sanskrit.
Use ordinal numbers to describe order.
Practice forming sentences with ordinal numbers.
Identify adjectives in Sanskrit.
Understand how adjectives describe nouns.
Learn adjective agreement with gender and number.
Form simple sentences using adjectives.
Identify and use demonstrative pronouns.
Form sentences using 'Esha' and 'Ete'.

topics.title_en: First Person Pronouns (Aham, Vayam, Mama, Asmakam)
objectives: Use first person pronouns correctly.
Construct sentences with 'Aham', 'Vayam', 'Mama', 'Asmakam'.

topics.title_en: Second Person Pronouns (Tvam, Yuyam, Tava, Yushmakam)
objectives: Use second person pronouns correctly.
Construct sentences with 'Tvam', 'Yuyam', 'Tava', 'Yushmakam'.
Form questions using interrogative pronouns.
Understand the gender and number agreement of pronouns.
Introduce oneself in Sanskrit.
Ask and answer simple personal questions.
Introduce other people in Sanskrit.
Identify different professions and roles.

chapters.title_en: Chapter Fifteen: Parts of the Body

objectives: Identify and name various body parts in Sanskrit.
Learn the Sanskrit vocabulary for body parts.
